creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:

=== Checking filesystem state
	-----

Fix: Since the package can't be build, no PORTREVISION bump is needed.
	Note to the maintainer: a PORTREVISION may be resetted while
	updating a PORTVERSION. ;-)



WBR
